---
title: "Player Change Engine"
description: "MLB player change detection with recent-versus-prior z-scores and full-season league percentiles."
---

::: {.page-intro .change-engine-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">Player intelligence</span>

# What changed—and how good is it?

The Change Engine sifts six hitter and pitcher measures, finds each player’s most unusual recent movement, and keeps the full-season league context beside it.
:::

{{< include includes/player-change-cards.html >}}

::: {.section-action}
[Continue to season leaderboards](players.qmd){.btn .btn-metallic}
[Compare team dossiers](team-dossiers.qmd){.btn .btn-sabr-navy}
:::
